name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Here’s another reason why Trump might win:
body:
We didn't expect this. | I'm going to be completely honest about this, Peter: _We did not expect Donald Trump to have such a great fundraising month in July._

He brought in over $80 million, which is pretty damn serious -- the kind of money that will allow him to run a real campaign to go toe-to-toe with ours. We have to respond by making sure we have the resources to beat him. **[Can you chip in right now?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYxNzAwMjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMDQ4MzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** When you do, we’ll send you a free sticker to say thank you.

We now have to face the fact that Donald Trump could start out-raising us. While we’ve been working for more than a year to build and grow our grassroots support (and done some incredible things!), Trump's supporters are stepping up, and those numbers are just going to keep growing.

We’ve always known that he could win this election, and this is another reason why that might happen.

This is an incredible team, Peter. We’ve come from behind before, and we’ve made amazing progress, but we can’t slow down even for a second. **In some states, ballots will start being mailed out in just 45 days -- can you step up right now?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYxNzAwMjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMDQ4MzgyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: protect voting (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c87/738133e4/371b1ce9/7f82f62d/2815109885/VEsH/ "https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/e160806")
---
| [_**Stand up to protect voting rights. Add your name >>**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c87/738133e4/371b1ce9/7f82f62d/2815109885/VEsE/ "https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/e160806") Friends,

Today is the 51st anniversary of the _Voting Rights Act_ (VRA). For over 5 decades the VRA protected minority groups from discriminatory laws that restricted access to the polls.

**Then the Supreme Court gutted it.** It struck down one of the major provisions of the VRA -- and left it up to Congress to fix it.

Which of course Republicans in Congress have (unsurprisingly) neglected to do.

Rick Scott and Florida Republicans wasted no time taking advantage of the weakened VRA. They've thrown up hurdles between people and the polls -- cutting early voting hours and "Souls to the Polls" Sunday voting, tangling registration drives in red tape, denying the right to vote to nonviolent ex-offenders who've paid their debt to society, and passing discriminatory voter ID laws.

**The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy -- laws we pass should make it easier to vote, not easier to turn people away.**

I'm fighting to restore the VRA and protect voting rights for all Americans. **Today I need your help.**

[_**Demand that Congress restore the VRA. Add your name to mine >>**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c87/738133e4/371b1ce9/7f82f62d/2815109885/VEsF/ "https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/e160806")

Congress has the power to fix this. On this anniversary, let's pressure them to use it.

Patrick |

name: Rita Zawaideh, JayInslee.com
subject: A governor who does the right thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's up to all of us to help. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTMxNTM5MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgwNDUzMzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, Here in Washington, we have a governor who does the right thing -- even during tough times. Case in point: Governor Jay Inslee's decision to welcome refugees to our state wasn't just the right thing to do, it was deeply personal to me. I had been organizing tours in the Middle East for years, so when the refugee crisis began in Syria, I heard from Washingtonians all over the state who wanted to help. It's in that moment of crisis that I decided to start an organization dedicated to helping the refugees in Syria. To me, helping seemed like the only option. **And Governor Jay Inslee agreed.** Now, more than ever, we need to fight back against the hatred and division in this country. I'm proud to support our Washington values of tolerance and inclusion, but those values cannot stand alone. We must all come together and affirm our support. [**Will you join me today and add your name in support of these Washington values?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTMxNTM5MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgwNDUzMzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) As we know, too many leaders in our country and across the world decided to let hate and fear dictate their decision to close their doors to refugees. Not our governor. At a time when the easy political decision would have been to close our doors and our hearts, Governor Inslee took a stand on the side of justice. He chose to do the right thing by welcoming refugees to our state. I'm so proud to call Jay Inslee my governor. Today, with the fear-mongering and hate we're seeing in our national political discourse -- Governor Inslee's compassionate, inclusive brand of progressive leadership is more important than ever. Thanks to Governor Inslee, our state is more welcoming, more tolerant, and safer. But now, we're seeing threats to these values. Republicans like Donald Trump and Governor Inslee's opponent are spreading messages of fear and division. [**Here 's how we respond to this hate, together. Join me today to affirm your support for our Washington values of tolerance and inclusion -- and to stand on Governor Inslee's side.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTMxNTM5MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgwNDUzMzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0) His actions to support refugees say so much about his values. He's a leader who isn't afraid to do what's right, even if it isn't popular. This is the quality we want from our leaders. I'm proud to support Governor Inslee. Thank you for joining me, Rita Zawaideh
Salaam Cultural Museum | [**SIGN ON »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTMxNTM5MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgwNDUzMzM4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Official Van Hollen Campaign
subject: [SIGN ON]: Fundamental rights under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
>
>
[**SIGN ON: Protect Voting Rights >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a5f/70cdc2ba/470f2164/39769fc/1009264849/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/restore-our-voting-rights-now-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+ON+Protect+Voting+Rights+gtgtgt&utm_campaign=em080516&source=em080516")
Friend,

Fifty one years ago today, Republicans joined with Democrats to pass the Voting Rights Act. The journey to that historic moment was paved by sacrifice and struggle. Sadly, today that right is once again under threat as a result of the Supreme Court's 5-4 decision in 2013 which opened the door to those that want to rollback voting rights protections.

As a co-sponsor of the Voting Rights Reauthorization Act, Chris is fighting to restore the full protections of the original act. But Republicans in the Senate and House have blocked this effort to prevent states from erecting new barriers to the right to vote in America.

**[Friend, will you join Chris in telling Congressional Republicans that their refusal to allow a vote on voting rights is a disgraceful abuse of power?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a5f/70cdc2ba/470f2164/39769fd/1009264849/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/restore-our-voting-rights-now-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+FIRSTNAMEFriend+will+you+join+Chris+in+t&utm_campaign=em080516&source=em080516")**

Today's Republican Party seeks to win elections through subtraction, not addition. They seek political victories by blocking citizens from voting, rather than trying to win them over. In fact, eight days ago, the federal Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit said that North Carolina had "targeted African Americans with almost surgical precision" in their efforts to raise new obstacles to voting in that state.

Please join Chris today in calling upon Republicans to end this shameful effort to limit the right to vote.

**[http://action.vanhollen.org/ProtectVotingRights](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a5f/70cdc2ba/470f2164/39769fa/1009264849/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/restore-our-voting-rights-now-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+httpactionvanhollenorgProtectVotingRight&utm_campaign=em080516&source=em080516")**

Thanks for taking action,

Team Van Hollen
>

---

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Are you up for this, Peter?
body:
We can't let up now | I'm sure you heard that Donald Trump had a lousy week, Peter.

But in the middle of a lot of bad news came some good news for Trump that was arguably more important than anything else that happened: His campaign, along with the Republicans, announced they raised $82 million in July -- nearly as much as what we raised.

Let me put it simply: That amount of money is enough to reset the table in this election -- to fundamentally change the landscape and the path forward.

It's crucial that we maintain our fundraising advantage and make sure Trump can’t spend his way out of the hole he’s in.

If we do -- if you and our 2-million-plus community of donors come through like you always do -- we'll have blocked off one of the best paths he has remaining to regain the momentum in this race.

If we don't...we're right back where we were a few weeks ago.

**Are you up for it? Chip in right now, and let’s make sure we retain our advantage over Trump heading into the final weeks of this campaign (not to mention you’ll get a free sticker, too):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million people standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYxNzM0MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYxMTc1NTAyS0&mt=1&rt=0)!
